# Team Contribution Matrix {#app-contribs}

@tbl-contribs is meant to properly account for the various contributions made to this work. Single check-marks indicate assistance and double-checks indicate primary contributors for each category / sub-category. I1 and I2 refer to the two investigations that were included in the IRB, as described in @sec-irb.


::: content-hidden

| Category     | Subcategory     | DJO | RS  | GH  | JE  | KM  | DO  | VB  | MH  | AB  | DT  | CT  | DC  | KT  |
| ------------ | --------------- | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
| IRB          | Admin           | ✓✓  |  ✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |
|              | Strategy        | ✓✓  | ✓   |  ✓  |  ✓  |     |     | ✓✓  |  ✓  |     |     |     |     |     |
|              | Write I1        | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     |  ✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |
|              | Write I2        |     |     |     |     |     |     | ✓✓  | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     |
|              | Review          |     |  ✓  |  ✓  |     |     |     | ✓✓  |  ✓  |     |     |     |     |     |
|              | Edit            | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     |  ✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |
| Experiments  | Design          | ✓✓  |  ✓  |     |     |     |     |  ✓  |     |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |     |     |
|              | Administration  | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |
|              | Conduct         | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |
|              | Recruitment     | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |
| Data         | Collection      | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |     |  ✓  |
|              | Analysis        | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     |  ✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |
| Software     | Direct / Manage | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |  ✓  |     |     |     |     |
|              | Development     |  ✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |     | ✓✓  | ✓✓  | ✓✓  |     |     |
| Dissertation | Plan            | ✓✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |
|              | Write           | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |
|              | Review          |     |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |  ✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |
|              | Edit            | ✓✓  |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |     |

: Contributions to this work. {#tbl-contribs .striped}

:::

::: {#tbl-contribs tbl-pos="H"}
![](/images/a2-contributions.png)

Contributions to this work.
:::

Legend:

- Author
	- DJO: Danny J. O'Leary
- Dissertation Committee
	- RS: Dr. Richard Sesek
	- GH: Dr. Gregory Harris
	- JE: Dr. John Evans
	- KM: Dr. Konstantinos Mykoniatis
	- DO: Darren Olsen, JD
- Research Collaborators
	- VB: Victoria Ballard
	- MH: Md Monir Hossain
- Research Assistants
	- AB: Alex Barras
	- DT: David "Brown" Teague
	- CT: Carson Tillery
- Protocol Associates
	- DC: Diego Roberto Caputo Rodriguez
	- KT: Kralyn Thomas

A portion of this research was funded by the Industrial Base Analysis & Sustainment Program, Dual-Purpose Robotic 3d Scanning System for Dimensional & Welding Inspection of Large Ground Vehicles, agreement number CS-20-1601.
